name: Fuji Offset Plates Manufacturing Ltd
summary: Fuji Offset Plates Manufacturing Ltd manufactures and supplies plates and chemicals for the printing industry in Singapore, Malaysia, Sri Lanka, and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Printing Plates and Cylinders, Investment Holding, and Investment in Property Development Companies. It engages in the sale of pre-sensitized offset plates and CTP plates; manufactures and sale of print cylinders; and the supply of related industry required chemicals. The company is also involved in the trading of printing cylinders and its related products; and letting of properties. In addition, it invests in commercial, industrial, hospitality, residential, and/or mixed development properties. The company was incorporated in 1982 and is based in Singapore.
